body: The goal measure export button does nothing after clicking. Spinner appears for 2 seconds then disappears with no file downloaded and no error.
Thanks Marcus. Can you share the browser and OS version, and whether you're in Chrome or the native iOS app?
Chrome 124 on MacOS Sonoma 14.4. Error code in console: export_renderer_timeout_503. Happens on every participant record we try.
Login redirects continuously. Seems to complete SAML handshake then loop back to MCWC Chronic Pain Program login page. Affecting all 6 clinicians at Billings Clinic.
Checking SSO config - Billings Clinic entityID may have changed when they migrated Azure AD tenants last week. Investigating with engineering.
Could you send the FY2025-26 annual invoice as PDF? Our finance team needs it for the July budget reconciliation.
Attached the invoice PDF for MTOTA FY2025-26. Annual amount $2,400 for 4 professional seats. Marking this solved.
Three of our four iPads at BRC showing the same crash. iPhone users fine. Crash happens immediately on launch after the iOS 18.4 update last Tuesday.
Readers are completing check-ins - we can see the timestamp on their end - but the coach dashboard shows last sync 48 hours ago. No error emails.
Confirmed: sync worker for Billings Clinic org stalled. Root cause looks like a queue backlog from the SSO migration Tuesday. Escalating to Wei for hotfix.
Confirmed across three Pixel and two Samsung devices on Android 15. Home program reminders just stopped after the update. iOS users at our site are fine.
Thanks Hannah. Looks like the Android 15 notification channel permissions changed. We have a fix queued for the 3.0.4 patch - targeting end of week.
I used the exact template headers from the help center. The error says column 7 mismatch but our file only has 6 columns. Attaching the CSV.
Got it Owen - your file has a trailing comma on the header row creating a phantom 7th column. Strip that and re-upload. I'll also file a ticket to make the parser tolerant of trailing delimiters.
Goniometry values show fine on screen but the exported PDF leaves the ROM table blank. Tested on two coach accounts, same result.
Confirmed the seat count for Bozeman Health is now corrected to reflect the two offboarded clinicians. Your next invoice will prorate the difference. Marking solved.
Our home health clinicians chart offline in rural areas with no signal, then sync at the office. About one in five visits throws a conflict error and we lose the note.
Several goal measure micro-course subscribers completed all modules but the certificate download returns a 404. They need these for CEU records before the AOTA renewal deadline.
On the pediatric dashboard the 3-5 age band scores are showing under the 6-8 header and vice versa. Looks like the band labels are swapped after the latest release.

We've identified the SMS provider throttling issue causing the 2FA delay. Putting this on hold while the provider rolls out a regional fix. Recommend enabling authenticator-app 2FA as an interim workaround.
